## Summary

## Tests

- [ ] `npm run all`
- [ ] `npm run format`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Source behavior changes include updated `dist/`
- [ ] Public behavior changes include docs/changelog updates

## Security

- [ ] Dependency or workflow changes are pinned deterministically
- [ ] Scanner changes preserve offline static analysis by default
- [ ] New or changed findings include conservative fixtures/tests
